operational_knowledge_units.title: Beveled tote racking design positions tote securely for parcel impact
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that Fortna designed and installed tote racking with a beveled design intended to securely position the tote for parcel impact.
observed_evidence: Bullet: "Beveled design to securely position tote for parcel"
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tote racking impact slide says Fortna designed and installed the tote racking. The beveled design securely positions the tote for parcel impact.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit operational procedure on tote racking impact slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Informational slide describing tote racking design and beveled positioning behavior; no action sequence or operator task is shown.
warnings: Slide contains design context only and does not provide reusable action steps.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate because the slide only describes that Fortna designed and installed tote racking and that the beveled design securely positions the tote for parcel impact; it does not provide explicit steps.
